# ClaimWatch

ClaimWatch is a US consumer recall, refund, settlement, and claim deadline tracker.

## Important URLs
- Home: https://simon622.shop/
- Latest JSON: https://simon622.shop/api/latest.json
- All items JSON: https://simon622.shop/api/items.json
- RSS feed: https://simon622.shop/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://simon622.shop/sitemap.xml
- Methodology: https://simon622.shop/methodology/
- Sources: https://simon622.shop/sources/
- Companies: https://simon622.shop/companies/
- Topics hub: https://simon622.shop/topics/

## Data Policy
Trend data is used for prioritization. Official source matching is required before an item is marked as verified. Monitoring pages are informational and should not be treated as official legal, medical, or financial advice.

## Current High-Priority Items
- Ford Motor Company: POWER TRAIN:AUTOMATIC TRANSMISSION:FLUID/LUBRICANT:VALVES/VALVE BODY Recall (2024 ford f-150): https://simon622.shop/item/nhtsa-25v164000/
